div.p: The official URL for this implementation guide is:
FHIR Implementation Guide for the Swiss Electronic Emergency Record

description.value: FHIR Implementation Guide for the Swiss Electronic Emergency Record
Types of advance directives and emergency medical orders.

name.value: CH Emergency Record Advance Directive DocumentReference

description.value: Reference to advance directives and emergency medical
Structured anatomical location of an implant in the Emergency Record. Carries an unlateralised body site in `location` and the laterality (or other directional qualifier) in `locationQualifier`.
Bundle profile for Emergency Record.
Swiss Emergency Record based on International Patient Summary
Device profile for implants in the Emergency Record.

name.value: CH Emergency Record Device Use Statement

description.value: Use of an implanted device in the Emergency Record. The `bodySite` CodeableConcept may carry the ChEmrBodyStructureReference extension to link to a `ChEmrBodyStructure` for structured anatomy + laterality.
DocumentReference profile for information on documents in the Emergency Record.

Medication Statement for the Swiss Emergency Record. Captures a medication the patient is taking with a treatment reason, a dose quantity, and a dosing schedule expressed using the CH EMED dosage pattern.
Observation profile for cognitive disability in the Emergency Record.

name.value: CH Emergency Record Observation Resuscitation Status

description.value: Observation profile for documenting the patient's resuscitation (code) status.

name.value: CH Emergency Record Physical Disability Observation

description.value: Observation profile for physical disability in the Emergency Record.
RelatedPerson profile for emergency contacts and family members in the Emergency Record.

name.value: CH Emergency Record Risk to Healthcare Personnel

description.value: Risk to healthcare personnel emanating from the patient — typically a communicable / infectious-disease condition or another patient-side circumstance that healthcare personnel need to be aware of for their own safety when treating the patient in an emergency context.
Links a CodeableConcept body site to a BodyStructure resource carrying structured anatomy and laterality. Used where the FHIR UV bodySite extension is not allowed by its context list.
Permitted values for the MRI safety status property of a device, per ASTM F2503: MR Safe, MR Conditional, MR Unsafe.

Safety classification of a medical device in the magnetic resonance imaging (MRI) environment. Semantics aligned with ASTM F2503 (Standard Practice for Marking Medical Devices and Other Items for Safety in the Magnetic Resonance Environment). Defined locally because SNOMED CT International does not currently publish dedicated qualifier-value concepts for these classifications.
Value Set for clinical document types
Value set for the types of cognitive disabilities based on SNOMED CT.
UDI jurisdiction for the European Commission (republished from the FHIR Device documentation).
General example of a practitioner
General example of a advance directive
General example of an allergy
Complete Emergency Record Bundle
Example: Dementia
General composition for the Emergency Record
General example of a condition
General example for a device
General example of a Document References
General example of a vaccination
General example of a medical device
General example of a medication statement
Example of Metformin 500 mg tablet medication
Gynecology practice in Basel
General example of a Patient
General example of a physical disability
General example of a practitioner role
General example of a Pregnancy
General example of a related person
General example of a resuscitation status observation (for CPR)
Risk to healthcare personnel emanating from the patient — viral hepatitis type B.
GS1 device identifier namespace recognised as a UDI issuer (republished from the FHIR Device documentation).
Codes for implant types
Value sets for the types of disabilities
Coded resuscitation status values based on SNOMED CT, including all descendants of 304251008 (Resuscitation status).

SNOMED CT concepts that may indicate a risk to healthcare personnel emanating from the patient. Includes selected children of the Infectious disease hierarchy whose descendants are person-to-person transmissible — viral, bacterial, sexually transmitted, respiratory, healthcare-associated and parasitic disease — plus an aggressive behavior finding. Branches that do not pose a meaningful staff-transmission risk (anatomical-location infections, post-procedural / device-associated infections, sepsis variants, congenital and perinatal infections, plant / Microspora / Oomycota / fish infections, and the like) are excluded.
Vollständiger eNotfallpass für Muster Max (Anwendungsfall 1).
Elektronischer Notfallpass für Muster Max — Anwendungsfall 1.
Diagnose arterielle Hypertonie (Muster Max, 2016).
Diagnose koronare Herzkrankheit (Muster Max, 2015).
Herzschrittmacher implantiert bei Muster Max (2015).
Muster Max trägt einen Herzschrittmacher (implantiert 2015).
Ärztliche Notanordnung von Muster Max (2024, im EPD hinterlegt).
Patientenverfügung von Muster Max (2022, beim Hausarzt hinterlegt).
Schrittmacherausweis (2015, im EPD hinterlegt).
BELOC ZOK Retardtabletten 50 mg (Metoprolol), Packung à 100 Stk (Swissmedic 52110).
PLAVIX Filmtabletten 75 mg (Clopidogrel), Packung à 28 Stk (Swissmedic 54509).
Beloc Zok 50 mg (Metoprolol) für Bluthochdruck — Dosierung 1-0-0.5-0.
Plavix 75 mg (Clopidogrel) zur Prophylaxe nach Schlaganfall — Dosierung 1-0-0-0.
Generic Hausarztpraxis for UC1 (Care-Team filler).
Patient Muster Max — Anwendungsfall 1: Bewusstlose Person im Spitalnotfall.
Generic Hausarzt for UC1 (Care-Team filler).
PractitionerRole linking UC1 Hausarzt to UC1 Hausarztpraxis.
Notfallkontakt: Vreni Muster (Ehefrau von Max Muster).
Penicillin-Allergie mit Reaktion Atemnot (Walter Schmid).

Elektronischer Notfallpass für Walter Schmid — Anwendungsfall 2.
Diagnose Schlaganfall (Walter Schmid, 2023).
Status nach Splenektomie (Walter Schmid, 1969 nach Motorradunfall).
Patientenverfügung von Walter Schmid (2022, beim Hausarzt hinterlegt).

SORTIS Filmtabletten 40 mg (Atorvastatin), Packung à 30 Stk (Swissmedic 54085).

Aspirin cardio 100 mg, 1-0-0-0 — Status nach Schlaganfall.
Atorvastatin 40 mg, 0-0-1-0 — Status nach Schlaganfall (vaskulär bedingt).
Epril 20 mg (Enalapril), 1-0-0-0 — Bluthochdruck.
Xigduo XR 1000/5 mg, 0-0-2-0 — Diabetes.
Generic Hausarztpraxis for UC2 (Care-Team filler).
Patient (78 J., alleinlebend, Spitex 2x/Tag) — Anwendungsfall 2: Allgemeiner Notfalldienst am Wochenende.
Aphasie als Kommunikationsbeeinträchtigung nach Schlaganfall.
Generic Hausarzt for UC2 (Care-Team filler).

Spitex (Hausbesuch 2x täglich) als Notfallkontakt für UC2.
Vollständiger eNotfallpass für Lara Keller (Anwendungsfall 3).
Elektronischer Notfallpass für Lara Keller — Anwendungsfall 3.
Angeborener Herzfehler (Lara Keller, 2008).
Eisenmangelanämie (Lara Keller, 2024).
Mechanische Aortenklappenprothese (implantiert 2010).
Lara Keller trägt eine mechanische Aortenklappenprothese (implantiert 2010).
MARCOUMAR Tabletten 3 mg (Phenprocoumon), Plastflasche à 25 Stk (Swissmedic 19395).
Marcoumar 3 mg (Phenprocoumon) — Thromboembolieprophylaxe nach mechanischem Klappenersatz. Dosierung nach separater Verordnung (INR-gesteuert).

Aortenaneurysma (Beat Frei, 2024).
BILOL Filmtabletten 5 mg (Bisoprolol), Packung à 30 Stk (Swissmedic 54030).
Bilol 5 mg (Bisoprolol) — Blutdrucksenkung bei Aortenaneurysma. Dosierung 1-0-0-0.

Chronische koronare Herzkrankheit (Anna Meier, 2018).
ASPIRIN CARDIO Filmtabletten 100 mg (Acetylsalicylsäure), Packung à 28 Stk (Swissmedic 51795).
